title: Dashboard redesign — command-centric HUD, unified positions panel
objective: Rebuild dashboard.html from shadow-advisory-centric framing to a trade-execution-first interface. The current layout gives Shadow Feed equal prominence with Active Positions. After rework: HUD shows system/execution health; left column shows a single unified Positions panel merging paper trades and shadow recs; Shadow Feed demoted to a drawer tab.

api_endpoints./api/state: bot loop health, open_positions array (slug, side, entry_px, confidence, mode), bankroll, r25 stats, mode
api_endpoints./api/trades: all trades (recent closed + open), fields: market_slug, side, entry_px, exit_px, pnl_usd, status, source, confidence, ts_open
api_endpoints./api/mlb-shadow: shadow recs with full computed fields: market_slug, action, fair_win_prob, entry_price, current_price, tp_price, sl_price, unrealized_pnl_dollars, status_label, resolved, away_team, home_team, inning, tracked_team, confidence, edge_yes, edge_no, ts
api_endpoints./api/games: ESPN scoreboard with live score, inning, base runners, count
api_endpoints./api/signals: derived from open positions in state.json
api_endpoints./api/candidates: raw bot candidate queue with confidence, spread, gate results

source_values.shadow_only: (virtual — not in DB) shadow rec that was NOT paper-executed

left_col: Shadow Advisory section (stats bar + ticker feed)
right_col: KPI strip (Bankroll, Win Rate R25, Open, Net P&L, Expectancy, Live Games)
Drawer (tabs: Trade Log, Candidates, Markets, Signals, Manual)

existing_good_components: pos-card with prob-track-v2 — keep and extend
game-card with diamond and count display — keep
trade-card — keep in Trade Log tab

section_A_hud.description: Rename and reframe the 4-cell sticky HUD strip
new_cells: SYSTEM: bot status dot + loop count (was implicit in header only)
POSITIONS: count of all open positions (paper executed — from /api/state open_positions.length)
LIVE P&L: total unrealized P&L in dollars across all active shadow recs (from /api/mlb-shadow pnl.unrealized_pnl_dollars)
section_A_hud.remove: Shadow-specific framing from HUD labels. 'Shadow P&L' → 'Live P&L'. 'Active' cell counts paper positions, not shadow recs.

section_B_positions.description: Unified Active Positions panel — replaces current left column's two sections
section_B_positions.merge_logic: Fetch both. For each open paper trade (status='open' from /api/trades), check if a shadow rec exists with same market_slug — if yes, enrich with shadow rec fields (current_price, tp_price, sl_price, unrealized_pnl_dollars, status_label). For shadow recs with no matching paper trade, show as SHADOW source.
card_fields: matchup: away_team @ home_team (from shadow rec) or slug short-form
source badge: PAPER-BOT (source=bot), PAPER-MODEL (source=model_bridge), MANUAL (source=manual), SHADOW (shadow-only, unexecuted)
current price (cents) — from shadow rec current_price if available
live PnL dollars — from shadow unrealized_pnl_dollars if available
game status chip: LIVE / NEAR-CLOSE / FINAL / SCHEDULED (from /api/games cross-reference or inning field)
status badge: OPEN / RESOLVED_WIN / RESOLVED_LOSS / SL_ZONE / PENDING
section_B_positions.prob_track: Keep existing prob-track-v2 component, it already renders entry/current/TP/SL correctly
section_B_positions.remove: Shadow Advisory stats bar (sh-stats-grid with Signals/No Trade/Win Rate/P&L). Shadow Feed ticker. These move to a new Shadow tab in the drawer.

section_C_resolution.description: Resolved positions must show resolved, not open
section_C_resolution.requirement: shadow recs with resolved=true already render with status_label (RESOLVED_WIN/RESOLVED_LOSS). Paper trades with status=closed must also show as resolved in the unified panel. A closed paper trade should render with a resolved card style (won/lost), not disappear — keep in panel for 10 minutes after close, then let it age out naturally via /api/trades limit.
section_C_resolution.note: No backend change needed. Front end: in unified render, treat t.status === 'closed' as resolved. If t.pnl_usd > 0 → 'won' card class, else → 'lost' card class.

changes: Add a 'Shadow' tab to the drawer tab-nav (between Trade Log and Candidates). This tab renders the shadow feed ticker (compact rows) and the sh-stats-grid summary.
Candidates, Markets, Signals tabs stay but are not default. Default tab = Trade Log (unchanged).
Remove the standalone Shadow Advisory section from the left column entirely.

layout_after.left_col: Unified Active Positions panel (full left column, no Shadow Feed section below it)
layout_after.right_col: Live Games (unchanged) + KPI strip (can simplify or keep as-is) + Drawer (tabs: Trade Log | Shadow | Candidates | Markets | Signals | Manual)

acceptance_criteria: HUD cells are labeled: system status, mode, active positions count (paper), live P&L dollars
Left column shows ONE section: Unified Active Positions — no separate Shadow Feed section below it
Each position card shows source badge: PAPER-BOT, PAPER-MODEL, MANUAL, or SHADOW
Paper trades enriched with shadow rec data when slug matches (current price, PnL, TP, SL visible on card)
Shadow-only recs (not executed) still appear in the Unified Positions panel with SHADOW badge
Shadow Feed ticker and shadow stats bar appear only inside the new Shadow drawer tab — NOT in left column
Resolved positions (resolved=true OR status=closed) show won/lost card styling
Drawer has a Shadow tab between Trade Log and Candidates
All existing drawer tabs still function (Trade Log, Candidates, Markets, Signals, Manual)
No production logic files touched (core/, bot_core.py, launch_all.py, mlb_model/)
Page still loads and renders with no JS errors when /api/mlb-shadow or /api/trades returns empty
verification: Open http://localhost:8000 and confirm: HUD shows system/mode/positions/pnl labels
Confirm left column has single Unified Positions section with no Shadow Feed below it
Confirm drawer has Shadow tab that contains the shadow ticker
Confirm source badges render on position cards
rollback: Revert dashboard.html only. dashboard_server.py changes (if any) are additive and backward-safe.
notes: dashboard_server.py already returns all needed fields — /api/mlb-shadow has entry_price, current_price, tp_price, sl_price, unrealized_pnl_dollars, status_label, resolved. /api/trades has source, entry_px, exit_px, pnl_usd, status.
Slug-matching between /api/trades open records and /api/mlb-shadow recs is the key frontend enrichment pattern.
The prob-track-v2 component is already correct — do not rewrite it, just ensure it receives the right entry/current/tp/sl values.
If a minor backend addition is truly needed (e.g. /api/trades needs to also return open-only), it may be added to dashboard_server.py only.
CSS design tokens are already correct — dark theme, --green/--red/--gold/--blue. Keep them.
Mobile-friendliness: the existing responsive grid already works on mobile. Don't break it.
